description_long: This awning features a gently curved canopy supported by four robust, arching wooden posts that converge at the top in a cross-braced pattern. The canopy itself is a smooth, solid surface, likely made from a weather-resistant material, and is colored in a light, neutral tone. The wooden support structure is visually prominent, with each leg extending vertically before curving outward to provide stability. The design is open on all sides, allowing for easy passage beneath the shelter. The edges of the canopy are straight and clean, with no decorative trim or embellishments. There is no visible branding, signage, or text present on the structure.
description: A freestanding awning with a light-colored, curved canopy supported by four arching wooden posts in a cross-braced configuration. The design is open-sided with a clean, modern appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing two wooden posts and the curved canopy arching between them, highlighting the cross-braced top.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying all four posts and the symmetrical, dome-like canopy with its central cross-brace.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, emphasizing the curvature and the structural support.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open underside of the canopy and the arrangement of the four supporting posts.
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with four arching wooden posts and cross-bracing
